\tzpentry{ID5609}{Phase Angle Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5609 introduces Phase Angle Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} G(r,\theta,\phi)=g(\theta,\phi)\Bigl(\frac{r}{R}\Bigr)^{\beta}\cos\bigl(\kappa\ln(r/R)+\varphi_0\bigr). \end{equation}
